glosses.fr: faire connaissance; rencontrer (pour la première fois)
glosses.it: conoscere; incontrare per la prima volta
glosses.nb: bli kjent (med); møte for første gang
glosses.sv: lära känna; träffas för första gången
glosses.da: lære at kende; møde for første gang
glosses.ja: 知り合う; 初めて会う

translations.en: I would like to get to know you.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn làm quen với bạn.
translations.nl: Ik zou je graag leren kennen.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne bli kjent med deg.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne lære dig at kende.
translations.ja: あなたのことをもっと知りたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II of 'mögen'); finite present, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular, accusative; direct object of the verb complex.
Bare infinitive; first element of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen' ('to get to know').
Bare infinitive; second element and lexical head of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen'.

sentences.target: Er will die neuen Nachbarn kennen lernen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ vɪl diː ˈnɔʏ̯ən ˈnaːxbaʁn ˈkɛnən ˈlɛʁnən/

translations.de: Er will die neuen Nachbarn kennen lernen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ vɪl diː ˈnɔʏ̯ən ˈnaːxbaʁn ˈkɛnən ˈlɛʁnən/
translations.en: He wants to meet the new neighbors.
translations.es: Él quiere conocer a los nuevos vecinos.
translations.fr: Il veut rencontrer les nouveaux voisins.
translations.ko: 그는 새 이웃들을 만나고 싶어 해요.
translations.ru: Он хочет познакомиться с новыми соседями.
translations.pt: Ele quer conhecer os novos vizinhos.
translations.he: הוא רוצה להכיר את השכנים החדשים.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn làm quen với những người hàng xóm mới.
translations.ar: هو يريد التعرف على الجيران الجدد.
translations.nl: Hij wil de nieuwe buren leren kennen.
translations.uk: Він хоче познайомитися з новими сусідами.
translations.hu: Meg akar ismerkedni az új szomszédokkal.
translations.hi: वह नए पड़ोसियों से मिलना चाहता है.
translations.el: Θέλει να γνωρίσει τους νέους γείτονες.
translations.nb: Han vil bli kjent med de nye naboene.
translations.sv: Han vill lära känna de nya grannarna.
translations.ro: El vrea să cunoască noii vecini.
translations.da: Han vil gerne lære de nye naboer at kende.
translations.ja: 彼は新しい近所の人たちと知り合いになりたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; finite present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses volition and selects a bare infinitive.
Definite article; plural, accusative; introduces the direct-object noun phrase.
Attributive adjective; weak inflection (-en) after definite article; plural, accusative; modifies 'Nachbarn'.
Common noun; masculine, plural, accusative; head of the direct-object noun phrase.
Bare infinitive; first element of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen'.
Bare infinitive; second element and lexical head of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen'.

sentences.target: Wir können uns heute kennen lernen.

translations.de: Wir können uns heute kennen lernen.
translations.en: We can get to know each other today.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天可以互相认识。
translations.yue: 我哋今日可以互相認識。
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta có thể làm quen với nhau.
translations.nl: We kunnen elkaar vandaag leren kennen.
translations.hi: हम आज एक-दूसरे को जान सकते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi kan bli kjent i dag.
translations.id: Kita bisa saling mengenal hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi kan lära känna varandra i dag.
translations.da: Vi kan lære hinanden at kende i dag.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; finite present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses ability/possibility and selects a bare infinitive.
Reflexive/reciprocal pronoun; 1st person plural, accusative; functions as the (reciprocal) direct object of 'kennenlernen'.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the action.
Bare infinitive; first element of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen'.
Bare infinitive; second element and lexical head of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen'.

sentences.target: Lena möchte das Team kennen lernen.

translations.de: Lena möchte das Team kennen lernen.
translations.en: Lena would like to meet the team.
translations.es: A Lena le gustaría conocer al equipo.
translations.ru: Лена хотела бы познакомиться с командой.
translations.pt: Lena gostaria de conhecer a equipe.
translations.vi: Lena muốn làm quen với nhóm.
translations.nl: Lena wil graag het team leren kennen.
translations.hi: लीना टीम से मिलना चाहती है.
translations.el: Η Λένα θα ήθελε να γνωρίσει την ομάδα.
translations.nb: Lena vil gjerne bli kjent med teamet.
translations.ro: Lena ar dori să cunoască echipa.
translations.cs: Lena by se chtěla seznámit s týmem.
translations.ja: レナはチームに会いたいです。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II of 'mögen'); finite present, 3rd person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article; neuter, singular, accusative; introduces the direct-object noun phrase.
Common noun; neuter, singular, accusative; head of the direct-object noun phrase.
Bare infinitive; first element of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen'.
Bare infinitive; second element and lexical head of the separable verbal complex 'kennenlernen'.
